phase_name: Session 45: Wick rotation, quaternionic/octonionic extensions, Fueter zeros, adelic barrier

remaining_tasks.name: Write up computational results as a paper

blockers.description: Proof wall: every decomposition of the barrier circles back to proving an inequality between analytic and arithmetic quantities that IS the Riemann Hypothesis
The adelic barrier is always positive but the 1D projection loses 99.5% of the norm. The cross-term ratio approaches 0.5 from below with margin ~1/L — asymptotically tight

decisions.decision: Concavity of B_E at delta=0 is FALSE (Parseval forces convexity)
decisions.rationale: |H'|^2 speed term dominates, B/A ratio only 0.01-0.07
Derived analytically from 4D Laplacian of slice extension using CR equations

decisions.decision: Octonionic zeta has full SO(7) symmetry
decisions.rationale: Dirichlet series n^{-s} uses real log(n), so scalar*octonion preserves all symmetry

decisions.decision: Pi projects 1000x more onto j-axis than finite primes
decisions.rationale: Pi is coherent (single frequency log(pi)/2), primes decohere (many frequencies)

decisions.decision: Adelic barrier always positive, RH = cross-term bounded
decisions.rationale: Each prime in own dimension -> Pythagorean sum. 1D projection introduces cross-terms

decisions.decision: Move to paper write-up after cross-term push failed to close
decisions.rationale: Cross/Adelic^2 ratio approaches 0.5 from below with margin ~1/L, asymptotically tight

next_action: Write up results as a paper: 'Quaternionic structure of the completed Riemann zeta function'. Key results: Fueter-derivative connection, pi as sphere, 1000x j-separation, adelic barrier decomposition, cross-term formulation of RH.
context_notes: Session 45 (a-p): 16 sub-sessions exploring Wick rotation, quaternionic/octonionic extensions, Fueter-regular zeta, bicomplex functional equation encoding, and adelic barrier. Started from Boyle-Turok cosmological entropy analogy. Key arc: complex barrier -> quaternionic barrier -> pi as coherent sphere -> primes as incoherent noise -> adelic orthogonality -> cross-term = RH. The proof wall stands but the geometric/physical picture is the clearest it has ever been. 16 new scripts, ~2500 lines of computation.
